content.speakerText: Hey, I saw your post on Instagram—what's your username?
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，我看到你在Instagram上的帖子了，你的用户名是什么？
expectedAnswers: It's @jenny_adventures. I post mostly hiking photos there.
I'm @jenny_adventures on Instagram—I'm more active than on Facebook.
You can find me as @jenny_adventures—I don't really use other apps anymore.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否准确提供用户名或说明使用情况
语言准确性：是否正确使用 '@handle' 格式，避免拼写错误
表达自然度：是否使用日常口语表达，如 'I'm more active than...' 或 'I don't really use...'
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'username', 'Instagram', 'active', 'other apps' 等关键词
